examples: A poet can survive everything but a misprint.
So, you will conclude that there was a misprint in the paper.
Be careful about reading health books. You may die of a misprint.
New York City--no, that's not a misprint--reported more than 25, 000 green jobs in 2006.
Sometimes an error can be a misprint, such as an extra zero that makes the bill jump from three figures to four.
